notes:
### v1.3.2

#### Technical Notes
- Kept the Progression tab hidden while preparing its market and accessory data foundations.
- Added bundled marketplace gem and accessory assets for T3/T4 gem estimate rows and ancient necklace, earring, and ring estimate rows.
- Reworked marketplace icon resolution so gem assets load from `src/assets/market/gem` and accessory assets load from `src/assets/market/accessories`.
- Added manual-only support accessory estimate rows beside existing DPS accessory estimates, including DPS/Support role filtering and combat/support role icons.
- Added support accessory source data for Brand Power, Identity Gain, Ally Attack Power, Ally Damage, Weapon Power %, and flat Weapon Power, using Lost Ark Bible combat-power examples where available and documented estimates where exact values are still missing.
- Updated DPS accessory value mappings from Lost Ark Bible combat-power examples for Attack Power, Weapon Power, Crit Rate, and Crit Damage.
- Added accessory upgrade helper functions for future progression analysis so current accessory rolls can be compared against higher-value candidates.
- Improved marketplace accessory rendering with compact colored stat text and cleaned engraving names by hiding the repeated `Engraving Recipe` suffix.
- Centered dashboard label popups so compact detail panels stay inside the app window on narrower layouts.
- Fixed mixed raid difficulty tooltip handling in both Dashboard and To Do so planned Hard/Normal versus cleared Mixed states are explained correctly.
- Refined dashboard label popups and To Do raid gate tooltips to better expose available characters, non-gold tracked raid progress, and planned-versus-cleared difficulty information.

## Installation
Download `LOA.Tracker_1.3.2_x64-setup.exe` below.
